name: CoStar Group, Inc.
description: CoStar Group, Inc. is a leading provider of commercial real estate information, analytics, and online marketplaces. Founded in 1987, the company conducts expansive, ongoing research to produce and maintain the largest and most comprehensive database of commercial real estate information. CoStar's suite of online services enables clients to analyze, interpret, and gain unmatched insight on commercial property values, market conditions, and available availability. The company also operates prominent online marketplaces for buying and selling commercial properties, apartment rentals, and land.
